name: rack10
description: 10-inch LabRax mini-rack mechanical reference (v1: LabRax geometry only): 1U pitch, hole center-to-center span, usable/panel widths, per-U hole pattern. No governing standard exists for 10in racks; all values corroborated across the designer's own article and an independent to-scale diagram.
sources: ISO 273 (metric clearance holes, close fit) — named standard, not fetched; backs M6 screw clearance, repo hardware/rack19 precedent
ANSI B18.2 (machine-screw close-fit clearance drill) — named standard, not fetched; backs #10-32 screw clearance //VERIFY, repo rack19 precedent
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cage_nut — repo rack19 precedent; cage-nut square hole size, not used by LabRax, carried for future vendors
